## Description
Explain the purpose of this pull request in a few sentences.

## Changes Made
List all changes made to the code. Be specific and use bullet points if necessary.

- Change 1
- Change 2
- ...

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Attach any relevant screenshots that might help reviewers understand the changes being made.

## How to Test
Provide detailed instructions on how to test the changes made. This could include steps to run the application, preferred browsers for testing or any specific environment setup required.

## Related Issues
List any related issues that this pull request addresses or fixes. Use Github's syntax for referencing issues by typing # followed by the issue number.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have tested these changes locally.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation and/or added new documentation where needed.
- [ ] My code follows accepted best practices, standards, and company policies.
- [ ] I have checked my code and corrected any misspellings.
